name: Professional and Durable!
reviewBody: Palmetto Epoxy transformed our garage floor. The craftsmanship is exceptional and the durability is unmatched. Highly recommend their services!

name: Beautiful and Long-Lasting
reviewBody: We had our epoxy floors installed last year and they still look brand new. The surface is easy to clean and extremely durable. Great investment!

name: Outstanding Customer Service
reviewBody: From the initial consultation to the final installation, the team at Palmetto Epoxy was professional and courteous. The quality of their work exceeded our expectations.
